abilities.name: Siphon
abilities.effect: Stance. Maren absorbs the next spell cast by an enemy, negating it and recovering MP equal to the spell's cost. Against enemies that do not use MP, Siphon restores MP equal to the spell's tier value (Tier 1: 5 MP, Tier 2: 15 MP, Tier 3: 30 MP, Tier 4: 50 MP). Once selected, Maren holds Siphon until the next enemy spell is cast, then absorbs it automatically. If no enemy spell comes before Maren's next turn, the stance ends with no effect. Generates +20 WG on success.
abilities.description: Absorb the next enemy spell, negating it and recovering MP.

abilities.name: Resonance
abilities.effect: Amplifies the next magical action by any ally by 30%. Affects spells (damage/healing +30%), Spiritcall effects (+30% potency), and the next Forgewright device deployed (+1 turn duration). For Bulwark's Aegis Veil, converts single-target to party-wide at half strength (20% magic damage reduction for 2 turns instead of 40% for 3 turns). Must be cast before the ally acts. Generates +10 WG.
abilities.description: Amplify an ally's next magical action by 30%.

abilities.name: Unweave
abilities.effect: Dispels all buffs from one enemy. If the enemy has Pallor-type buffs, also deals magic damage equal to Maren's Magic x 3. Generates +10 WG.
abilities.description: Dispel all buffs from an enemy, with bonus damage against Pallor.

abilities.name: Ley Surge
abilities.effect: Consumes 50 WG. All allies' next spells cost 0 MP. Lasts until each ally has cast one free spell.
abilities.description: Channel the Weave to grant all allies one free spell cast.

abilities.name: Mirrorsong
abilities.effect: Maren copies the last spell cast by any combatant (ally or enemy) and casts it immediately at her own Magic stat. If no spell has been cast this battle, Mirrorsong fails with no effect and no MP/WG cost. Generates +15 WG.
abilities.description: Copy and recast the last spell used by any combatant.

abilities.name: Annulment
abilities.effect: Maren unravels all active magic on the battlefield — all buffs, debuffs, status effects, devices, barriers, and ongoing spells are removed from ALL combatants (allies and enemies alike). Then deals non-elemental magic damage to all enemies equal to (Maren's Magic x 2) + (effects removed x 15 spell power). Extremely powerful but indiscriminate.
abilities.description: Unravel all magic on the battlefield and deal massive damage.

abilities.name: Pallor Sight
abilities.effect: Passive. All enemies in battle have their elemental weaknesses, HP values, and status immunities visible from battle start (normally hidden until discovered). Pallor-type enemies have their current HP regen rate displayed and any hidden phase thresholds revealed.
abilities.description: Reveal all enemy weaknesses, HP, and hidden information from battle start.
